title: RFI for CAD Model Conversion and Comment Adjudication Services
name: RFI for CAD Model Conversion and Comment Adjudication Services
statement_of_work: Not responding to this RFI does not preclude participation in any future RFP , if any is issued. 1.0 Description & Background Naval Surface Warfare Center Panama City Division (NSWC PCD) is seeking information on industry capabilities to perform a large-scale Computer-Aided Design (CAD) model conversion and engineering comment adjudication project.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the RFI for CAD Model Conversion and Comment Adjudication Services solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
dept: DEPT OF DEFENSE.DEPT OF THE NAVY.NAVSEA.NAVSEA WARFARE CENTER.NAVAL SURFACE WARFARE CENTER
description: Not responding to this RFI does not preclude participation in any future RFP , if any is issued. 1.0 Description & Background Naval Surface Warfare Center Panama City Division (NSWC PCD) is seeking information on industry capabilities to perform a large-scale Computer-Aided Design (CAD) model conversion and engineering comment adjudication project.
